description_long: This clock tower features a robust, circular clock face set within a thick, rounded frame, supported by a rectangular pedestal base with stepped detailing. The clock face is a warm tan color, bordered by a darker brown rim, and displays simple black tick marks for hour indicators, with a single, prominent gold hand pointing upward. The structure is accented by two short, angled finials at the top, giving it a stylized, almost nautical appearance. The base is solid and geometric, with layered molding and a subtle gold trim along the bottom edge, suggesting a sense of permanence and stability. The rear and sides of the tower are plain, with the back being entirely solid and unadorned. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on bold shapes and contrasting earth tones, suitable for a public urban setting.
description: A stylized, circular clock tower with a tan clock face, bold brown frame, and a stepped rectangular base with gold trim. The design is minimalist and geometric, featuring a single gold clock hand and two angled finials on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full clock face with hour markings, a single gold hand, and the detailed stepped base.
description_view_1: Rear angled view revealing the solid, unadorned back and the thickness of the circular frame.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the plain, featureless back and the rectangular pedestal base.
description_view_3: Side-front view highlighting the depth of the frame, the angled finials, and partial visibility of the clock face.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is circular with a tan background, bordered by a thick brown rim. It features simple black tick marks for hour indicators, no numerals, and a single gold hand pointing upward. There are no decorative elements or additional hands, giving it a minimalist appearance.
